name: Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the butter and powdered sugar until smooth.
2. Add the egg and vanilla; beat well.
3. Combine the flour, baking soda, and salt in a separate bowl.
4. Mix the dry ingredients into the creamed mixture.
5. Fold in the chocolate chips and chopped walnuts.
6. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto a greased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 10-12 minutes.
8. Cool on a wire rack.
